title: templetonia egena
intro: Templetonia egena, also known as the pink pea bush, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Templetonia egena include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
